extensionAttribute.description: Returns SecureBoot certificate expiration dates for Windows Parallels VMs for the current user.
extensionAttribute.scriptContentsMac:
#!/bin/bash
get_host_users() { dscl . list /Users | grep -v "^_" | grep '\S' }
function get_license_state() { is_installed=$(which prlsrvctl) if [[ $is_installed ]]; then license_output=$(prlsrvctl info | grep "License:")
if [[ -n "$license_output" ]]; then license_state=$(echo "$license_output" | awk -F "state='" '{print $2}' | awk -F "\'" '{print $1}')
if [[ "$license_state" != "valid" ]]; then echo "<result>$license_state</result>" exit 1 fi else echo "<result>No License found</result>" exit 1 fi else echo "<result>Parallels is not installed</result>" exit 1 fi }
get_license_state
is_prlctl_installed=$(which prlctl) if [[ -z "$is_prlctl_installed" ]]; then echo "<result>Parallels is not installed</result>" exit 1 fi
result_items=""
for user in $(get_host_users); do [ -n "${user}" ] && [ -d "/Users/${user}" ] || continue
VMS_DATA=$(sudo -u "$user" prlctl list -a -i --json 2>/dev/null \ | awk -F'"' ' /\{[[:space:]]*$/ { depth++; if (depth==1) { id=""; name=""; state=""; os="" }; next } /^[[:space:]]*\},?[[:space:]]*$/ { if (depth==1 && os=="win-11") print id "\t" name "\t" state depth--; next } depth!=1 { next } $2=="ID" { id=$4 } $2=="Name" { name=$4 } $2=="State" { state=$4 } $2=="OS" { os=$4 } ' || true)
[[ -z "$VMS_DATA" ]] && continue
while IFS= read -r vm_line || [[ -n "$vm_line" ]]; do vm_id=$(echo "$vm_line" | cut -f1) vm_name=$(echo "$vm_line" | cut -f2) vm_state=$(echo "$vm_line" | cut -f3) [[ -z "$vm_id" ]] && continue
if [[ "$vm_state" != "running" ]]; then item="$vm_name: not running" if [[ -n "$result_items" ]]; then result_items="$result_items, $item" else result_items="$item" fi continue fi
output=$(sudo -u "$user" prlctl exec "$vm_id" powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try{\$b=(Get-SecureBootUEFI pk).Bytes;\$c=\$null;foreach(\$o in @(44,40)){try{\$c=New-Object System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2(,[byte[]]\$b[\$o..(\$b.Length-1)]);break}catch{}};if(\$c){\$pkExp=\$c.NotAfter.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd')}else{\$pkExp='Unknown'}}catch{\$pkExp='Unknown'};try{\$b=(Get-SecureBootUEFI kek).Bytes;\$c=\$null;foreach(\$o in @(44,40)){try{\$c=New-Object System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2(,[byte[]]\$b[\$o..(\$b.Length-1)]);break}catch{}};if(\$c){\$kekExp=\$c.NotAfter.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd')}else{\$kekExp='Unknown'}}catch{\$kekExp='Unknown'};Write-Host ('PK Exp: '+\$pkExp+', KEK Exp: '+\$kekExp)" </dev/null 2>&1 || true) expiry_line=$(echo "$output" | tr -d '\r' | grep -E '^PK Exp: ' | tail -n 1 || true)
if [[ -n "$expiry_line" ]]; then item="$vm_name: $expiry_line" else item="$vm_name: Unable to determine PK/KEK expiration" fi
if [[ -n "$result_items" ]]; then result_items="$result_items, $item" else result_items="$item" fi done <<< "$VMS_DATA"
done
if [[ -n "$result_items" ]]; then echo "<result>$result_items</result>" else echo "<result>No Windows VMs found</result>" fi
exit 0
